[[af:Aardvark (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gī-hâi]][[de:Erde-Schwein]][[fr:Cochon de terre (Cycle sexagésimal chinois)]][[hak:Kí-hoi]][[ja:己亥]][[ko:기해]][[nds:Eer-Swien]][[vi:Kỷ Hợi]][[za:Geijhaih]][[zh-min-nan:Kí-hāi]][[zh-yue:己亥]][[zh:己亥]]

'''Yin Earth Pig''', also known as '''Kigai''' (己亥, Tsuchinoto-i, Kidonoinoshishi, Kigai), is one of the elements in the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 36th combination in the Sexagenary cycle, following [[Yang Earth Dog]] and preceding [[Yang Metal Rat]]. According to [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] [[Tsuchinoto (己)]] corresponds to Yin [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] [[Pig (zodiac)|Pig (亥)]] corresponds to Yin [[Water (wuxing)|Water (水)]], creating a [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]] (Earth overcomes Water) relationship.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Pig (己亥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐhài
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 hoi6
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-i
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-inoshishi
***Onyomi 1: kikai
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gihae (기해)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Hợi

==Years of Yin Earth Pig==
Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 39 are considered Yin Earth Pig years.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of the Yin Earth Pig'''
|-
![[1st millennium]]!![[2nd millennium]]!![[3rd millennium]]
|-
|
* [[39]]
* [[99]]
* [[159]]
* [[219]]
* [[279]]
* [[339]]
* [[399]]
* [[459]]
* [[519]]
* [[579]]
* [[639]]
* [[699]]
* [[759]]
* [[819]]
* [[879]]
* [[939]]
* [[999]]
|
* [[1059]]
* [[1119]]
* [[1179]]
* [[1239]]
* [[1299]]
* [[1359]]
* [[1419]]
* [[1479]]
* [[1539]]
* [[1599]]
* [[1659]]
* [[1719]]
* [[1779]]
* [[1839]]
* [[1899]]
* [[1959]]
|
* [[2019]]
* [[2079]]
* 2139
* 2199
* 2259
* 2319
* 2379
* 2439
* [[2499]]
* [[2559]]
* [[2619]]
* [[2679]]
* [[2739]]
* [[2799]]
* [[2859]]
* 2919
* 2979
|}

==Months of Yin Earth Pig==
In years where the last digit is 1 or 6 (corresponding to the [[Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] [[Kanoto (辛)]] or [[Hinoe (丙)]]), the [[October]] of that year is considered a Yin Earth Pig month. However, this applies to the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]], and in some cases, the [[Solar term]] (from [[Lidong]] to the day before [[Daxue (solar term)|Daxue]]) is used.

==Days of Yin Earth Pig==
=== Selection Days ===
Yin Earth Pig days are the 7th day of the [[Tenitsu-shin]] cycle.

== References ==

==See Also==

{{wikidata link|Q904335}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
